title: Learning Resource Pathway for Module 5: Data Structures & Applications
description: A flowchart guiding students through the suggested learning resources for an 8-hour module on Data Structures and Applications, categorized by topic and resource type.
relationships: Start with Video Lectures for foundation, then move to Textbook Readings for depth. Use Visualization Tools for complex structures. Practice with Coding Tutorials and Problem Sets. Reinforce learning with Case Studies. Seek help in Discussion Forums. Culminate learning by applying knowledge in the Final Project.
